error_signature: SQL compilation error: syntax error line 1 at position 0 unexpected ‘undefined’
title: Snowflake tool receives undefined query
symptom: The Snowflake tool does not receive the SQL query generated by the AI agent, resulting in a syntax error indicating 'undefined'.
not_this_if: The query is correctly formatted and received by Snowflake
root_cause: The error occurs because the Snowflake tool is not correctly referencing the generated SQL query from the AI agent. Instead of directly using the query, it attempts to use an undefined variable, leading to a syntax error.
fix_steps: In the Snowflake tool, replace the query reference with {{$fromAI('query')}}
Save the changes to the Snowflake tool configuration
Test the workflow again to ensure the query is received correctly
agent_instruction: Update the Snowflake tool to use the correct expression for the query reference.
